svg.title: RISC-V SoC architecture — V1.0 single-port baseline on Zynq-7000
svg.desc: Structural block diagram of a PicoRV32-based SoC with AXI4-Lite bus, BRAM, UART, CRC-32 and FPSQRT accelerators, with synthesis and performance stats
svg.text: Avnet ZedBoard · Zynq-7000 xc7z020 · 100 MHz verified
